title: Building a Real-Time Streaming Platform with Node.js & WebSockets
description: A deep dive into building scalable streaming infrastructure with Node.js, WebSockets, and Redis Pub/Sub. We cover connection pooling, backpressure handling, and horizontal scaling strategies.

title: Advanced React Patterns: The Secret to 10x Performance
description: Master React patterns that senior engineers use: compound components, render props, custom hooks, and the new concurrent features in React 19.

title: LIVE: Global Esports Championship – Grand Finals
description: Watch the best teams battle it out for the championship title. All matches streamed in 4K with real-time commentary.

title: Kubernetes for Developers: From Zero to Production
description: Learn Kubernetes from the ground up. We build and deploy a containerised microservice, set up Ingress, configure HPA, and run zero-downtime rolling updates.

title: LOFI Hip Hop Mix – 24/7 Study & Code Beats
description: Relax and focus with the best lofi hip hop beats. Perfect for late-night coding sessions, studying, or just chilling.

title: System Design Interview: Design Netflix from Scratch
description: Step-by-step walkthrough of designing a video streaming platform at Netflix scale. We cover CDN architecture, adaptive bitrate streaming, and database sharding.

title: CS2 Pro League – Season 4 Day 3 Highlights
description: Top plays and highlight reel from Day 3 of the CS2 Pro League Season 4. Clutch moments, incredible AWP shots, and the biggest upsets.

title: The Science of Black Holes – A Visual Journey
description: An immersive journey into the physics of black holes, event horizons, Hawking radiation, and the nature of spacetime around singularities.

title: Tokyo Street Food Tour – 4K Walking Vlog
description: Join me on a 4K immersive walk through Tokyo's Shibuya and Shinjuku, tasting the best street food the city has to offer.

title: Figma to Code: Design a SaaS Dashboard in 60 Minutes
description: Design and code a beautiful SaaS analytics dashboard from scratch. We go from Figma wireframe to pixel-perfect Tailwind CSS in under an hour.

title: NBA Highlights – Western Conference Finals Game 5
description: Best plays and final buzzer moments from Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals. An instant classic.

title: Rust in 2025: Why Systems Programmers are Switching
description: An honest look at Rust's learning curve, memory safety guarantees, and where it genuinely beats C++ and Go in production systems.

title: Machine Learning Explained in 20 Minutes
description: The clearest explanation of machine learning concepts on the internet. We cover supervised learning, neural networks, and transformers without the jargon.

title: LIVE: 24/7 Synthwave Radio – Code & Create
description: 24/7 synthwave and retrowave music for late-night coding sessions. No ads, no interruptions.

title: How to Speedrun Any Game: A Complete Beginner's Guide
description: Everything you need to know to get started speedrunning. We cover category selection, movement tech, glitch hunting, and building your first viable route.

title: The Ultimate Docker & DevOps Crash Course
description: Master Docker, Docker Compose, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and deployment to AWS in one comprehensive hands-on course.
